---
format: html
title: scale_prediction_abiotic()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>scale_prediction_abiotic</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Scale Prediction Abiotic Data</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Applies training-time scale attributes to abiotic predictor data used
for model prediction.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>scale_prediction_abiotic(data_climate, scale_attributes)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="data_climate">data_climate</code></td>
<td>
<p>Data frame containing one column for each entry in
'scale_attributes', typically 'age' and selected CHELSA variables.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="scale_attributes">scale_attributes</code></td>
<td>
<p>Named list of scale attributes as returned by
[scale_abiotic_for_fit()].</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>Data frame with the same columns as 'scale_attributes', scaled to the
training model scale.
</p>


<h3>Examples</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>scale_prediction_abiotic(
  data_climate = tibble::tibble(age = 0, bio1 = 8),
  scale_attributes = list(
    age = list("scaled:center" = 0),
    bio1 = list("scaled:center" = 6, "scaled:scale" = 2)
  )
)
</code></pre>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
